_comment: Ecosystem: Mosquito Valley (Country of Zhao). Full food web with 6 trophic layers and 10 seasonal/environmental states. Prime Directive: ecology exists objectively; player perception determines what they observe. No-Locked-Upgrades: all seasonal states are reachable by time/weather/event.
name: Mosquito Valley
description: The canonical Mosquito Valley where Wang Lin obtained his mosquito beast swarm. Millions of larvae, adult swarms, queens, egg chambers, blood pools.

spring.note: Egg chambers swell; queens lay millions.

summer.note: Swarms darken the sky; cultivation peaks.

winter.note: Larvae almost disappear; workers hibernate; queens cultivate in stillness.

tribulation_storm.note: Ancient mosquitoes awaken; mutations possible from lightning.

blood_moon.note: Population doubles; all castes frenzied; mutations likely.

nearby_corpse_battlefield.note: Population explodes; corpse-marrow fuels rapid breeding.

nearby_spirit_spring.note: Population stable but mutations occur; gold-carapace chance +500%.

nearby_dragon_corpse.note: Bloodline evolution chance; ancient-queen-tier mutation possible.

nearby_ancient_god_remains.note: Entire valley changes; queens ascend to ancient-queen tier; ecosystem restructures.

perception_tiers.mortal: Sees beasts and terrain; does not perceive trophic structure.
perception_tiers.foundation_establishment: Perceives trophic layers and seasonal shifts.
perception_tiers.nascent_soul: Perceives mutation potential and bloodline flows.
perception_tiers.spirit_severing: Perceives complete ecology as a living system.
